chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-54 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 144/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 145/25 4.For hearing of main case 17-03-2025 Mr. Ghulam Qadir Rind, Advocate for petitioners. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for petitioners places on record certain documents through statement, taken on record. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G present in Court in connection with other matters waives notice of this petition and submits that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law. Since this petition is filed against the harassment and for seeking protection; therefore, it is being disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to the office of AAG as well as SSP, Naushahro Feroze for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
